name: Drone Sensor & Navigation Attack
description: Simulation focusing on sensor disruption: IMU Drift, GPS Spoofing, and LiDAR Jamming.

techniques.comment: Occurrences: 12 | Mapped rule: Manipulation of Control (GPS Spoofing)
Occurrences: 15 | Mapped rule: Manipulation of View (IMU Drift / Telemetry Spoofing)
Occurrences: 5 | Mapped rule: Brute Force I/O (LiDAR Sensor Overload)
